title: 2026 Golden Globe Winner Predictions - Gold Derby
text: Gold Derby predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes identify Wagner Moura in The Secret Agent as the Best Actor Drama winner. One Battle After Another is projected to win three awards and Sinners is expected to capture Best Film Drama with seven nominations. The analysis highlights that both Warner Bros. films dominate predictions. Netflix's KPop Demon Hunters is projected to win Best Animated Feature and Best Song. The ceremony airs January 11 from the Beverly Hilton with Nikki Glaser hosting on CBS and Paramount+.
